creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to dewayne from comment #1)

I fully agree with this. I would even say that those patches need to be upstreamed otherwise Samba is basically doomed on FreeBSD. The effort of patch will be harder and harder.

I don't know what it takes to backport missing features from 13 to 12, but it seems it is critical for many.
